attributes.description: Alerts when new FDC (First Failure Data Capture) files are generated. Any increase is significant and indicates an internal queue-manager error.
attributes.name: [IBM MQ OTel] FDC files increasing

investigation_guide.blob:
## IBM MQ FDC files increasing

### What fired
`ibmmq_qmgr_fdc_files` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
FDCs are MQ's crash/assertion dumps. Their presence always indicates a non-trivial internal error that warrants support case.

### Triage
1. Inspect the FDC directory for the dumped files and reason codes.
2. Correlate with qmgr stability signals.

### Remediation
- Open a case with IBM support with the FDC bundle.
- If a known bug, apply the fix pack.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase. Do not loosen.
